items.evidence: if any(tag in stripped for tag in ("TODO", "FIXME", "HACK")):
items.recommended_fix: Triage or convert into tracked tasks.
items.title: TODO/FIXME/HACK comment
items.why_it_matters: Marks known incomplete or fragile work.

items.evidence: risks.append(self._risk("TODO/FIXME/HACK comment", "low", record["path"], idx, stripped[:180], "Marks known incomplete or fragile work.", "Triage or convert into tracked tasks."))

items.title: TODO/FIXME/HACK comment
items.why_it_matters: Marks known incomplete or fragile work.

items.evidence: if "while true" in low or re.search(r"\bwhile\s+1\s*:", low):

items.title: Unbounded loop candidate
items.why_it_matters: Loops without an obvious exit can hang the program.

items.evidence: if "except exception" in low and ("pass" in low or "continue" in low):
items.recommended_fix: Log or return structured warnings.
items.title: Broad exception swallowing
items.why_it_matters: Failures can be hidden from report and callers.

items.evidence: if "rm -rf" in low or "git reset --hard" in low:
items.recommended_fix: Require explicit confirmation and safer targeted operations.
items.title: Unsafe shell command
items.why_it_matters: Destructive commands can remove user work.
